description: Cloud Datastore is Google Cloud’s document-oriented NoSQL datastore service, now presented as Firestore in Datastore mode. It provides APIs and tools for storing, querying, importing, exporting, and managing datastore data and indexes within Google Cloud projects.
summary: Cloud Datastore on datastore.googleapis.com exposes a REST Data API and is also operated through the `gcloud datastore` CLI; both require Google Cloud authentication.

packages.runtimeHint: Install via the Google Cloud SDK
